content.text:
Based on the visualization of the molecule from the XYZ file "geomconf_4921.xyz", I can clearly identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 20 (carbon atom C:20):

The neighbor atoms covalently connected to atom 20 are:
- Atom index 19: N (nitrogen)
- Atom index 21: O (oxygen) 
- Atom index 22: C (carbon)

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 4921 (as indicated by the filename "geomconf_4921.xyz").

These three atoms are directly bonded to carbon atom 20, with O:21 forming a double bond (carbonyl group) and N:19 and C:22 forming single bonds.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 20, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
